title: RBSE 10th Result declared LIVE: Website still down; Jhunjhunu district tops class 10 board results
description: RBSE 10th Result declared LIVE: The results for the RBSE board class 10 have been announced. The results are available on the RBSE website and the HT Portal. Jhunjhunu district has secured the top spot in the list of highest pass percentage, with a percentage of 97.77%.
